entries.title: watcher fast-path applies all discovery filters via shared helper (#306)
entries.summary: Patch release. Filed as a follow-up audit to #300/#1.108.19 after @domis86 noted that other discovery filters might also be "forgotten" during watcher reindex.

entries.title: watcher fast-path honors `extra_ignore_patterns` (#300 follow-up)
entries.summary: Patch release. Reported by @domis86 on #300 after v1.108.18.

entries.title: summarizer runtime honors project config (#304)
entries.summary: Patch release. Closes #304 (the runtime gap I flagged when shipping v1.108.17's display fix).
